name: coTfsSDOSetAbortControl
title: coTfsSDOSetAbortControl
description: The function defines which values are allowed for successful test completion.

parameters.name: controlValue
parameters.description: 1: correct response or accepted SDO abort code (see coTfsSDOAddAccAbortCode) is allowed for successful test completion, default 2: correct response or any SDO abort code is allowed 3: correct response is not allowed 4: correct response is not allowed but any SDO abort code

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
